personas.name: Emily Wilson
personas.description: A user experiencing stress or anxiety who relies on the app for emotional support and practical coping strategies.
goals: Feel better after using the app
pain_points: Needs accessible and immediate emotional support
context: Using the app during stressful or emotional moments
Accessing support at any time of day
constraints: Responses must feel supportive and relevant
personas.notes: Replaced vague description with specific mental health use case and grounded goals in review evidence.

personas.name: David Lee
personas.description: A frustrated user who encounters technical issues such as crashes, glitches, and data loss while using the app.
goals: Use the app without crashes or interruptions
Ensure conversations and data are saved properly
pain_points: App crashes or freezes during use
context: Using the app casually or during moments of need
constraints: App must remain stable during use
User data must not be lost
personas.notes: Focused persona on technical reliability issues and removed unsupported assumptions like customer support concerns.

personas.name: Sophia Patel
personas.description: A user seeking meaningful and responsive AI conversations for emotional support.
goals: Have natural and relevant conversations with the AI
Receive responses that reflect what was said
pain_points: AI responses feel repetitive or robotic
Responses do not match user input
Frustration with lack of conversational depth
context: Engaging in multi-turn conversations with the chatbot
Using the app as a substitute for talking to someone
personas.notes: Clarified chatbot-specific issues and removed unrelated comparison-based assumptions.

personas.name: Michael Kim
personas.description: A regular user who identifies missing features and suggests improvements to enhance the app experience.
goals: Have features that better support long-term use
pain_points: Missing features such as memory of past conversations
context: Using the app repeatedly over time
constraints: New features must be implemented reliably
personas.notes: Refined persona to focus on concrete feature requests rather than vague improvement ideas.

personas.name: Olivia Brown
personas.description: A user facing accessibility and usability challenges, particularly related to language support and onboarding complexity.
goals: Use the app in a preferred language
Understand and navigate the app easily
context: Using the app occasionally for support
Trying to use the app despite usability barriers
constraints: Interface must be simple and intuitive
Support should not require extensive setup
personas.notes: Clarified accessibility focus and removed unsupported assumptions about pricing.
